v.code: /* rubric: P4+P5+P10 (hostApi-only; removed legacy mgmt actions) */ const sys = ctx.runtime.getModel(-10); if (!sys) return; const cell = ctx.runtime.getCell(sys, 0, 0, 0); let nextKey = null; let nextId = null; let nextLabel = null; for (const [k, l] of cell.labels.entries()) { if (!k.startsWith('intent_job_')) continue; const id = Number(k.slice('intent_job_'.length)); if (!Number.isInteger(id)) continue; if (nextId === null || id < nextId) { nextId = id; nextKey = k; nextLabel = l; } } if (!nextKey || !nextLabel) return; const job = nextLabel.v; const source = job && job.source ? job.source : null; const intent = job && job.intent ? job.intent : null; const sourceModelId = source && Number.isInteger(source.model_id) ? source.model_id : null; const sourceRef = source && Number.isInteger(source.p) && Number.isInteger(source.r) && Number.isInteger(source.c) && typeof source.k === 'string' ? source : null; const opId = intent && typeof intent.op_id === 'string' ? intent.op_id : ''; const action = intent && typeof intent.action === 'string' ? intent.action : ''; function ok(extra) { if (sourceRef) { ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(sourceRef.model_id, sourceRef.p, sourceRef.r, sourceRef.c, 'intent_result', 'json', Object.assign({ op_id: opId, result: 'ok', action }, extra || {})); } ctx.hostApi.rmCrossModel(-10, 0, 0, 0, nextKey); } function fail(code, detail) { ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(-10, 0, 0, 0, 'intent_error', 'json', { op_id: opId, code, detail, job: nextKey }); if (sourceRef) { ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(sourceRef.model_id, sourceRef.p, sourceRef.r, sourceRef.c, 'intent_result', 'json', { op_id: opId, result: 'error', code, detail }); } ctx.hostApi.rmCrossModel(-10, 0, 0, 0, nextKey); return; } if (!sourceModelId || sourceModelId <= 0) return fail('invalid_source', 'source.model_id must be > 0'); if (!opId || !action) return fail('invalid_intent', 'missing op_id/action'); const dedupeKey = 'intent_last_op_id_' + sourceModelId; const _lastRead = ctx.hostApi.readCrossModel(-10, 0, 0, 0, dedupeKey); const last = _lastRead && _lastRead.ok && _lastRead.data ? _lastRead.data.v : null; if (last && last === opId) { ctx.hostApi.rmCrossModel(-10, 0, 0, 0, nextKey); return; } ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(-10, 0, 0, 0, dedupeKey, 'str', opId); if (action === 'mgmt_bind_in' || action === 'mgmt_publish' || action === 'mgmt_put_mbr_v0') return fail('removed_action', action); return fail('unknown_action', action);

/* rubric: R14 setMqttTargetConfig system bridge */ const host = String(ctx.getState('pin_demo_host') || '').trim(); const port = ctx.getStateInt('pin_demo_port'); const clientId = String(ctx.getState('pin_demo_client_id') || '').trim(); if (!host || !port || !clientId) return; ctx.hostApi.setMqttTargetConfig(host, port, clientId);
